/usr/bin/g++  -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -Wundef -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wunused-local-typedefs -Wpointer-arith -Wwrite-strings -Wformat-security -Wlogical-op -Wdouble-promotion -Wshadow -Wno-psabi -Wno-variadic-macros -Wno-long-long -fno-check-new -fno-common -fstrict-aliasing -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/fullpivlu_int_ko.dir/fullpivlu_int.cpp.o -o fullpivlu_int_ko
